code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of Triples about food into a single fluent sentence.
    Each predicate is rendered with a simple natural‑language pattern;
    unknown predicates fall back to a generic “subject predicate object” form.
    All generated clauses are concatenated with commas and an “and” before
    the final clause to produce one coherent sentence.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Simple verb‑phrase mapping for the most common predicates.
    # The mapping returns a format string that expects (subject, object).
    predicate_map = {
        "country": "{s} is from {o}",
        "ingredient": "{s} contains {o}",
        "region": "{s} is from the region {o}",
        "division": "{s} belongs to the division {o}",
        "family": "{s} belongs to the family {o}",
        "order": "{s} belongs to the order {o}",
        "course": "{s} is served as a {o}",
        "dishVariation": "{s} can be prepared with {o}",
        "mainIngredient": "{s} is made with {o}",
        "leader": "{s} is led by {o}",
        "alternativeName": "{s} is also known as {o}",
        "creatorOfDish": "{s} was created by {o}",
        "creator": "{s} was created by {o}",
        "servingTemperature": "{s} is served {o}",
        "carbohydrate": "{s} contains {o} of carbohydrates",
        "fat": "{s} contains {o} of fat",
        "year": "{s} originated in {o}",
        "related": "{s} is related to {o}",
        "similarDish": "{s} is similar to {o}",
        "genus": "{s} belongs to the genus {o}",
        "language": "{s} uses the language {o}",
        "isPartOf": "{s} is part of {o}",
        "currency": "{s} uses the currency {o}",
        "demonym": "{s} is associated with the demonym {o}",
        "capital": "{s} has the capital {o}",
        "ethnicGroup": "{s} is home to the ethnic group {o}",
        "foundationPlace": "{s} was founded in {o}",
        "officialLanguage": "{s} has the official language {o}",
        "leaderTitle": "{s} has the leader title {o}",
        "served": "{s} is served {o}",
        "protein": "{s} contains {o} of protein",
        "class": "{s} belongs to the class {o}",
        "servingSize": "{s} has a serving size of {o}",
    }

    clauses = []
    for triple in triples:
        fmt = predicate_map.get(triple.predicate, "{s} " + triple.predicate + " {o}")
        clause = fmt.format(s=triple.subject, o=triple.object)
        clauses.append(clause)

    # Join clauses into a single sentence.
    if len(clauses) == 1:
        sentence = clauses[0] + "."
    else:
        sentence = ", ".join(clauses[:-1]) + ", and " + clauses[-1] + "."
    return sentence

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
